top.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
top.summary: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training effectiveness.

topIndia.summary: Bloomsbury Publishing is a beneficiary of a significant $1.5 billion settlement. This agreement resolves claims that Anthropic used copyrighted books without permission. A U.S. court identified over 14,000 Bloomsbury titles covered by this landmark payout. Authors and publishe…
